opportunities.whyItMatters: These 20 high‑spending VIPs have stopped buying, risking loss of a segment that already generated over $850k, so re‑engaging them can quickly restore premium revenue.
opportunities.recommendedAction: Send a tailored 30% discount on their favorite product line via email and WhatsApp.
opportunities.suggestedGoal: Re‑engage dormant VIP customers with a 30% personalized offer on WhatsApp and email

opportunities.title: Brew‑More: Equipment Upsell
opportunities.whyItMatters: 54 loyal coffee purchasers regularly spend, yet none have bought brewing gear, indicating a clear cross‑sell gap that can lift average order value.
opportunities.recommendedAction: Offer a bundle discount of 20% on coffee‑maker accessories when they buy their next coffee pack.
opportunities.suggestedGoal: Cross‑sell brewing equipment to loyal coffee buyers with a 20% bundle discount

opportunities.title: WhatsApp Reactivation Engine
opportunities.whyItMatters: 115 inactive customers represent $25,946 of untapped spend; WhatsApp has proven highest engagement, making it the fastest path to recovery.
opportunities.recommendedAction: Deploy a re‑engagement flow on WhatsApp featuring a limited‑time 25% off coupon.
opportunities.suggestedGoal: Recover inactive customers using WhatsApp with a limited‑time 25% off coupon
